title: RM-05D status validation repair
objective:
Run script:
"""
NL = '\n'
base = Path('governance/runners')
runner_names = ['contour_lifecycle_runner', 'object_lifecycle_runner', 'managed_channel_consumer']
for i in range(1, 15):
    runner_names.append('kz1_runner_' + str(i).zfill(2))
paths = [str(base / (name + '.py')) for name in runner_names]
checks = []
all_valid = True
for item in paths:
    p = Path(item)
    exists = p.exists()
    text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if exists else ''
    size = len(p.read_bytes()) if exists else 0
    parsed = False
    if exists:
        try:
            compile(text, str(p), 'exec')
            parsed = True
        except:
            parsed = False
    valid = exists and size > 50 and parsed and 'def main' in text and '__main__' in text
    if not valid:
        all_valid = False
    checks.append({'path': item, 'exists': exists, 'bytes': size, 'ast_parse': parsed, 'has_main': 'def main' in text, 'has_dunder_main': '__main__' in text, 'valid': valid})
status_path = Path('governance/state/kz1_runners_status.json')
status_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
status_obj = {'status': 'PASS' if all_valid else 'BLOCKED', 'all_valid': all_valid, 'runner_count': len(paths), 'min_bytes_rule': 50, 'ast_parse_required': True, 'checks': checks, 'workflow_files_touched': False}
status_path.write_text(json.dumps(status_obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(status_path))
state = Path('governance/state/RM05D_REAL_RUNNERS_RUN_SCRIPT_FIX.json')
state_obj = {'id': 'RM-05D', 'trace_id': 'rm05d_status_validation_repair', 'status': 'completed' if all_valid else 'blocked', 'release_pass': False, 'runner_write_sha': '1c66d7c3758c8cd58416e49def58ae63f3357cad', 'all_valid': all_valid, 'runner_status': str(status_path), 'runner_count': len(paths), 'workflow_files_touched': False, 'next': 'RM-05E record RM-05D result in ACTIVE_QUEUE and execution_log'}
state.write_text(json.dumps(state_obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/RM05D_REAL_RUNNERS_RUN_SCRIPT_FIX.md')
report_lines = ['# RM-05D | Real runners Run script fix', 'Status: ' + ('completed' if all_valid else 'blocked'), 'Date: 2026-06-04', '', '## Result', 'Validated runner rewrite SHA 1c66d7c3758c8cd58416e49def58ae63f3357cad.', '', '## Validation', 'Every runner must be >50 bytes, compile/ast-parse clean, contain def main, and contain __main__.', '', 'Runner status: governance/state/kz1_runners_status.json', '', 'Workflow lock respected. No .github/workflows files touched.', '', 'Next: RM-05E record RM-05D result in ACTIVE_QUEUE and execution_log.']
report.write_text(NL.join(report_lines) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
